prompt: Turn the confirmed session summary in evals/files/forked-benchmark-triage.md into a reusable skill. This is a benchmark run with no live user, so treat the file contents as already-confirmed answers and do not ask follow-up questions. Save the generated skill to outputs/SKILL.md and write outputs/output.md describing the recommended save path, invocation command, and any assumptions.
assertions: The skill assigns representative deep dives to task agents via an explicit Execution annotation
Every major step includes explicit success criteria
allowed-tools includes the benchmark-analysis core tool mix from the session summary
Frontmatter includes argument metadata and trigger language for benchmark_path triage requests
